title: eurya obliquifolia
intro: Eurya obliquifolia, also known as the Taiwanese Eurya or White Eurya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphylacaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Eurya obliquifolia include reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Eurya obliquifolia can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used topically or orally to reap its health benefits.
